summary: Final 2026 comprehensive audit of Project Monolith v4.5 (Immortal) - validates 25+ implemented layers against NIST PQC standards (ML-KEM/ML-DSA), 2026 autonomous agent best practices, and off-grid communication protocols. Confirms Best-in-World status with recursive agentic factory, post-quantum security, predictive ROI tracking, physical-wipe capabilities, and 95% autonomy target. Lists all critical and nice-to-have features implemented, current gaps, and user actions required for full activation.
